mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, merchant.id AS merchantId FROM sys_user u JOIN user_identity_binding binding ON binding.user_id = u.id AND binding.deleted = 0 AND binding.identity_type = 'MERCHANT' AND binding.status = 'ENABLED' JOIN member_account member_account ON member_account.id = binding.identity_ref_id AND member_account.deleted = 0 AND member_account.status = 'ENABLED' AND member_account.member_type = 'MERCHANT' JOIN merchant_info merchant ON merchant.member_id = member_account.id AND merchant.deleted = 0 AND merchant.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 'ENABLED' AND u.username = #{username} ORDER BY binding.is_default DESC, binding.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_spu ( supplier_id, spu_code, spu_name, brand_id, category_id, description, keywords, detail_content, main_image_id, sale_status, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{supplierId}, #{spuCode}, #{spuName}, #{brandId}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{keywords}, #{detailContent}, #{mainImageId}, 'ON', #{operatorId}, #{operatorId}, 0 )

INSERT INTO merchant_goods ( merchant_id, supplier_id, sku_id, spu_id, source_type, sale_price, freight_amount, rebate_rate, sale_status, delivery_mode, stock_qty, safety_stock, main_image_id, image_ids, keywords, detail_content, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{merchantId}, #{supplierId}, #{skuId}, #{spuId}, 'DIRECT', #{salePrice}, #{freightAmount}, 0, #{saleStatus}, #{deliveryMode}, #{stockQty}, #{safetyStock}, #{mainImageId}, #{imageIds}, #{keywords}, #{detailContent}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(mg.id AS CHAR) AS id, mg.id AS merchantGoodsId, mg.sku_id AS skuId, mg.supplier_id AS supplierId, supplier.supplier_name AS supplierName, CASE WHEN mg.supplier_id IS NULL THEN 'DIRECT' ELSE 'SUPPLIER_AUTH' END AS sourceType, CASE WHEN mg.supplier_id IS NULL THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE COALESCE(relation_row.status, 'ENDED') END AS cooperationStatus, CASE WHEN mg.supplier_id IS NULL THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE COALESCE(auth_row.auth_status, 'REVOKED') END AS authorizationStatus, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.sku_name AS skuName, brand.brand_name AS brandName, category.category_name AS categoryName, sku.spec_text AS specText, mg.sale_price AS salePrice, mg.current_cost_price AS costPrice, mg.rebate_rate AS rebateRate, mg.sale_status AS saleStatus, COALESCE(mg.sale_count, 0) AS saleCount, mg.stock_qty AS stockQty, COALESCE(sku.stock_qty, 0) AS supplierStockQty, mg.safety_stock AS safetyStock, mg.freight_amount AS freightAmount, COALESCE(mg.main_image_id, spu.main_image_id) AS mainImageId, COALESCE(mg.keywords, spu.keywords) AS keywords, COALESCE(mg.detail_content, spu.detail_content) AS detailContent, COALESCE(mg.description, spu.description) AS description, mg.delivery_mode AS deliveryMode, DATE_FORMAT(mg.updated_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updatedAt FROM merchant_goods mg JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = mg.sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_brand brand ON brand.id = spu.brand_id AND brand.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_category category ON category.id = spu.category_id AND category.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supplier_info supplier ON supplier.id = mg.supplier_id AND supplier.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_supplier_relation relation_row ON relation_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND relation_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND relation_row.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supplier_goods_authorization auth_row ON auth_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND auth_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND auth_row.supplier_sku_id = mg.sku_id AND auth_row.deleted = 0 WHERE mg.deleted = 0 AND mg.merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY mg.updated_time DESC, mg.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM merchant_goods mg JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = mg.sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_brand brand ON brand.id = spu.brand_id AND brand.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_category category ON category.id = spu.category_id AND category.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supplier_info supplier ON supplier.id = mg.supplier_id AND supplier.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_supplier_relation relation_row ON relation_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND relation_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND relation_row.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supplier_goods_authorization auth_row ON auth_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND auth_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND auth_row.supplier_sku_id = mg.sku_id AND auth_row.deleted = 0 WHERE mg.deleted = 0 AND mg.merchant_id = #{merchantId}

SELECT mg.id AS merchantGoodsId, mg.supplier_id AS supplierId, mg.source_type AS sourceType, relation_row.status AS cooperationStatus, auth_row.auth_status AS authorizationStatus FROM merchant_goods mg LEFT JOIN merchant_supplier_relation relation_row ON relation_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND relation_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND relation_row.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supplier_goods_authorization auth_row ON auth_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND auth_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND auth_row.supplier_sku_id = mg.sku_id AND auth_row.deleted = 0 WHERE mg.deleted = 0 AND mg.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND mg.id = #{merchantGoodsId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant_goods SET sale_price = #{salePrice}, rebate_rate = #{rebateRate}, sale_status = #{saleStatus}, delivery_mode = #{deliveryMode}, stock_qty = #{stockQty}, safety_stock = #{safetyStock}, main_image_id = #{mainImageId}, keywords = #{keywords}, detail_content = #{detailContent}, description = #{description}, updated_by = #{operatorId}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{merchantGoodsId} AND merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(mg.id AS CHAR) AS id, mg.id AS merchantGoodsId, mg.sku_id AS skuId, mg.supplier_id AS supplierId, supplier.supplier_name AS supplierName, CASE WHEN mg.supplier_id IS NULL THEN 'DIRECT' ELSE 'SUPPLIER_AUTH' END AS sourceType, CASE WHEN mg.supplier_id IS NULL THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE COALESCE(relation_row.status, 'ENDED') END AS cooperationStatus, CASE WHEN mg.supplier_id IS NULL THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE COALESCE(auth_row.auth_status, 'REVOKED') END AS authorizationStatus, spu.spu_name AS spuName, sku.sku_name AS skuName, brand.brand_name AS brandName, category.category_name AS categoryName, sku.spec_text AS specText, mg.sale_price AS salePrice, mg.current_cost_price AS costPrice, mg.rebate_rate AS rebateRate, mg.sale_status AS saleStatus, mg.stock_qty AS stockQty, COALESCE(sku.stock_qty, 0) AS supplierStockQty, mg.safety_stock AS safetyStock, mg.freight_amount AS freightAmount, COALESCE(mg.main_image_id, spu.main_image_id) AS mainImageId, COALESCE(mg.keywords, spu.keywords) AS keywords, COALESCE(mg.detail_content, spu.detail_content) AS detailContent, COALESCE(mg.description, spu.description) AS description, mg.delivery_mode AS deliveryMode, DATE_FORMAT(mg.updated_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updatedAt FROM merchant_goods mg JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = mg.sku_id AND sku.deleted = 0 JOIN product_spu spu ON spu.id = sku.spu_id AND spu.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_brand brand ON brand.id = spu.brand_id AND brand.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN product_category category ON category.id = spu.category_id AND category.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supplier_info supplier ON supplier.id = mg.supplier_id AND supplier.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN merchant_supplier_relation relation_row ON relation_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND relation_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND relation_row.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN supplier_goods_authorization auth_row ON auth_row.merchant_id = mg.merchant_id AND auth_row.supplier_id = mg.supplier_id AND auth_row.supplier_sku_id = mg.sku_id AND auth_row.deleted = 0 WHERE mg.deleted = 0 AND mg.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND mg.id = #{merchantGoodsId} LIMIT 1
